skill: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables
stem: In a county, the registration tax T, in dollars, is calculated using the formula above, where V is the value of the vehicle, in dollars. Which of the following expresses the value of the vehicle in terms of the registration tax?
rationale: Multiply both sides by 50: 50T = V − 250. Add 250: V = 50T + 250. Choice A is correct.
